description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top, likely housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is a solid, dark green color with a prominent silver Apple logo centered in the upper half. In the top left corner of the back, there is a raised, square camera module containing three large lenses arranged in a triangular pattern, along with a smaller sensor. The sides are metallic and flat, with visible buttons and ports, contributing to a premium, sturdy appearance. The overall design is minimalist and elegant, typical of recent Apple iPhone models.
description: A sleek, dark green Apple smartphone with a large display, triple rear cameras, and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, edge-to-edge display with a notch at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile and slight camera bump.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the dark green finish, silver Apple logo, and triple camera array in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim edge and the protruding camera module.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the phone, visually prominent against the dark green surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful, abstract gradient wallpaper with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: There are three large camera lenses and a smaller sensor arranged in a triangular pattern within a raised, square module at the top left corner on the back.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the sides, likely including a power button and volume rockers, but exact details are not fully clear from the images.
